# CWE-538: secrets written only to restricted internal directory.
lang: go
file: CWE-538-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"os"
	"path/filepath"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

func DumpConfigSnapshot(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) error {
	_ = db
	dsn := os.Getenv("DATABASE_URL")
	path := filepath.Join("/var/lib/slopguard/private", "config-snapshot.txt")
	return os.WriteFile(path, []byte("dsn="+dsn), 0o600)
}
